/home/node/.openclaw/workspace/emsdk/upstream/emscripten/emcc -s EXPORTED_FUNCTIONS='["_lo3_run", "_lo3_version"]' -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/test_parsing.dir/unit/test_parsing.c.o CMakeFiles/test_parsing.dir/__/src/var.c.o CMakeFiles/test_parsing.dir/__/src/global.c.o "CMakeFiles/test_parsing.dir/__/src/control-flow.c.o" CMakeFiles/test_parsing.dir/__/src/execute.c.o CMakeFiles/test_parsing.dir/__/src/parsing.c.o CMakeFiles/test_parsing.dir/__/src/warnings.c.o CMakeFiles/test_parsing.dir/unit/unity/unity.c.o -o /home/node/.openclaw/workspace/lo3-core/bin/test_parsing.js  -ldl
